data.title: Rails to Launch Mainnet and Native Stablecoin USDr on April 30
data.description: Rails announced the launch of its mainnet scheduled for April 30, alongside the release of its native stablecoin, USDr. According to NS3.AI, USDr will serve as the platform's native stablecoin, facilitating staking and fee payments.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 68,000 USDT with a 2.05% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 07, 2026, 14:07 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 68,000 USDT and is now trading at 67,844.65625 USDT, with a narrowed 2.05% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Biconomy Proposes ERC-8211 for Streamlined DeFi Transactions
data.description: Biconomy has introduced ERC-8211, a proposed Ethereum standard designed to enable multiple decentralized finance (DeFi) actions to be executed in a single transaction for applications and AI agents. According to NS3.AI, Ahmed Al-Balaghi highlighted that developers can implement this standard on existing Ethereum infrastructure and compatible networks without requiring a hard fork or changes to the core protocol.

data.title: SharpLink's cumulative Ethereum staking rewards have reached 16,947 ETH, with 511 ETH earned last week.
data.description: According to Odaily Planet Daily, Ethereum treasury company SharpLink announced on the X platform that since launching its ETH treasury strategy, the company's cumulative Ethereum staking rewards have reached 16,947 ETH. In addition, the company earned 511 ETH in Ethereum staking rewards last week.

data.title: Complexity of Virtual Currency Cases Hinges on Evidence
data.description: Virtual currency cases often involve intricate organizational structures, with the key to defining them lying in the evidence rather than the operational model. According to PANews, the complexity of these cases requires a thorough examination of the evidence to accurately determine their nature. This approach emphasizes the importance of evidence over the operational patterns in understanding and resolving virtual currency-related legal matters.

data.title: ROBO Put/Call Ratio Hits 20-Year High Amid Retail Fear in US Equities
data.description: The ROBO Put/Call Ratio has reached 1.0 for the first time in at least two decades, indicating significant fear among retail investors in U.S. equities. According to NS3.AI, this development reflects heightened caution in the market. Global Markets Investor data further reveals that short interest is at multi-year highs across major indices, including the S&P 500, Nasdaq 100, and Russell 2000.

data.title: Iran Shuts Down All Diplomatic Channels with the U.S.
data.description: Iran has terminated all diplomatic and indirect communication channels with the United States. According to Odaily, this development was reported by Iran's official media, the Tehran Times.

data.title: Tether Develops Decentralized Search Engine Hypersearch
data.description: Tether's CEO, Paolo Ardoino, announced on the X platform that the company's engineering team is actively working on new technology development to prepare for future products and services. According to Odaily, Ardoino revealed that Tether is developing a decentralized search engine called Hypersearch. This engine is built on a Distributed Hash Table (DHT) known as HyperDHT, enabling search services without the need for centralized servers, allowing users to directly retrieve content within a decentralized network.

data.title: Fluent Opens Registration for BLEND Token Public Offering
data.description: Fluent has announced that registration for the BLEND token public offering is now open. According to Foresight News, the offering aims to raise $1 million with a fully diluted valuation (FDV) of $100 million, with tokens fully unlocked at the Token Generation Event (TGE). The public offering will close on April 13, and the mainnet is scheduled to launch two weeks after the offering concludes.

data.title: The Rayls public blockchain mainnet is scheduled to launch on April 30th, with a fixed total supply of 10 billion RLS tokens.
data.description: According to official news, the Rayls public chain mainnet will launch on April 30th, simultaneously initiating a staking program and launching Rayls' native USD stablecoin, USDr, marking the official implementation of RLS's token economics. After mainnet activation, transaction fees (paying USDr on the public chain and RLS on the private chain) will be automatically converted, accumulated, burned, and redistributed: 50% of transaction fees will be permanently burned, creating deflationary pressure; 50% will be injected into the network security pool to reward validators. The total supply of Rayls tokens (RLS) is fixed at 10 billion, with the majority locked until 2028 to ensure long-term incentives and stable development. The circulating supply of TGE will be less than 15%. Investors and the team will have their majority of shares unlocked over 36 months after a 12-month cliff period. Furthermore, 10% of the tokens unlocked each month by the foundation will be burned, further accelerating deflation.

data.title: Fox News partners with Kalshi to introduce prediction markets to improve reporting accuracy.
data.description: Fox News, an American news network, has officially integrated the Kalshi platform, using prediction market mechanisms to increase accountability in news reporting and encourage content to be closer to the facts. As one of the three major mainstream news networks, Fox News hopes to use prediction markets to remove bias, enhance accuracy, and ensure that news reporting is not influenced by political stances and is guided by correctness.

data.title: Gold and silver prices generally fell, while cryptocurrency volatility rose, with the BVIX increasing by 1.2%.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices fell to $4,646.39 per ounce, a daily decrease of 0.09%. Silver prices fell to $71.808 per ounce, a daily decrease of 1.33%. The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 48.03, a daily increase of 1.20%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 68.36, a daily increase of 0.43%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate fell 0.13% to 6.86497. The USD/JPY exchange rate rose 0.09% to 159.827. In global stock indices, the Euro Stoxx 50 fell 0.65% to 5,663.60 points; the UK FTSE 100 fell 0.61% to 10,388.04 points; and the German DAX 40 fell 0.58% to 23,074.58 points. In commodities, WTI crude oil rose 2.88% to $116.09 per barrel, while Brent crude oil rose 0.71% to $113.39 per barrel. Gate allows users to directly trade traditional financial market products on its platform, providing a one-stop solution for precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration of crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi features have been fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to easily participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities outside the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: Iran has closed all diplomatic and indirect communication channels with the United States.
data.description: According to Iran's state-run Tehran Times, Iran has closed all diplomatic and indirect communication channels with the United States. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Stocks Open Lower as Nasdaq, S&P 500, and Dow Jones Decline
data.description: U.S. stocks experienced a decline at the opening today. According to NS3.AI, the Nasdaq Composite Index fell by 0.3% at the start of trading. Meanwhile, the S&P 500 Index opened with a decrease of 0.18%, and the Dow Jones Industrial Average saw a 0.2% drop. These early losses reflect a cautious market sentiment as investors assess ongoing economic conditions.

data.title: CleanSpark sold 405 spot BTC in March, bringing its Bitcoin holdings to 13,561.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company CleanSpark released its March operations report, disclosing that it mined 658 BTC last month, sold 405 BTC in the spot market and 500 BTC through option exercise. As of March 31, the company's Bitcoin holdings reached 13,561 BTC. CleanSpark also stated that as of the end of March, it had deployed approximately 224,000 mining rigs, operating at a hashrate of 50.0 EH/s. (PRNewswire)

data.title: AI Infrastructure Strategy Advances with New Data Center in Alberta
data.description:
AVAX One Technology announced on April 7 its plans to advance its AI infrastructure strategy by constructing a 10MW AI/HPC microgrid data center in Alberta, Canada. According to BlockBeats, the company has signed a front-end engineering design (FEED) plan for the project, which is set to be one of the first dedicated AI computing facilities in the region. The initiative leverages low-cost energy, approximately $0.04/kWh, combined with a microgrid model to provide scalable and cost-effective AI computing power to meet the growing demand for high-performance computing and artificial intelligence.

Additionally, the company revealed the purchase of 220 Bitcoin mining machines (Bitmain S21 Pro) to enhance its computing power. This acquisition serves as a transitional cash flow source before the AI data center becomes operational, implementing a dual-track approach of 'mining + AI computing'.

data.title: Uncertainty Surrounds Kevin Warsh's Fed Chair Nomination
data.description: Uncertainty looms over the confirmation timeline for Kevin Warsh's nomination as Federal Reserve Chair due to opposition from key Republican senators. According to Odaily, these senators are hesitant to advance his nomination while current Chair Jerome Powell remains under investigation. New York Fed President and Vice Chair of the Federal Reserve's policy committee, John Williams, stated that this uncertainty does not pose an issue for the Federal Reserve. The Federal Open Market Committee voted earlier this year to have Powell continue as the policy committee chair, allowing him to maintain the position until Warsh's confirmation. Williams emphasized that the committee is focused on its work, and there are no concerns about continuity.

data.title: A whale is suspected of selling 441,000 LINK tokens through GSR Markets, holding them for nearly two years and expecting a loss of $1.77 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, a whale (a large investor) is suspected of selling 441,000 LINK tokens through GSR Markets, with an estimated loss of $1.77 million over the past two years. Address 0xd7C…EA229 transferred $3.84 million worth of LINK to a GSR Binance deposit address 10 minutes ago. Tracing the source of funds, it appears that two addresses withdrew from Binance between June 2024 and October 2024 at an average price of $12.7; the current deposit price was $8.69, resulting in a 32% decrease in assets since the initial investment.

data.title: Ethereum Stablecoin Supply Hits Record High of $180 Billion
data.description: Ethereum-based stablecoin supply has reached an unprecedented level, surpassing $180 billion, according to Token Terminal data. According to NS3.AI, Ethereum now represents approximately 60% of the stablecoin market, highlighting its dominant position in the sector. This milestone reflects the growing adoption and reliance on Ethereum's blockchain for stablecoin transactions and storage.

data.title: A senior Iranian source said the US is seeking to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
data.description: A senior Iranian source stated that the US seeks to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, but Iran will not open the strait for "empty promises." If the US attacks Iranian power plants, the entire region and Saudi Arabia will be plunged into complete darkness. Iran will also show flexibility when it sees the US demonstrate flexibility, and if the situation spirals out of control, its allies will close the Bab el-Mandeb Strait. (Jinshi)
